title: Recruitment & Retention Executive
description:
About Hawker Boys

Hawker Boys is a social enterprise that trains and places ex-offenders into sustainable work in the hawker and food industry, with a structured pathway toward long-term stability and stall ownership.

Our work is practical, structured, and demanding. We believe in clear standards, dignity of work, and staying the course.

Role Overview

We are hiring a Recruitment & Retention Executive to engage potential trainees, guide them into our programme, and support them through training and early placement.

This role is people-facing and field-based. It requires conviction, clarity, and the ability to work with individuals who may be cautious, sceptical, or have faced repeated setbacks.

This is not an administrative HR role.

Key Responsibilities

Recruitment

  • Engage potential trainees through referrals from prisons, aftercare partners, and agencies

  • Clearly explain the Hawker Boys programme, expectations, and commitment required

  • Conduct intake conversations and follow-ups with potential trainees

  • Assess readiness and fit in collaboration with the programme team

Retention & Engagement

  • Maintain regular contact with trainees during training and early placement

  • Track attendance, engagement, and early warning signs of dropout

  • Encourage accountability and consistency while working closely with aftercare partners

  • Escalate issues early and coordinate support where needed

Stakeholder Coordination

  • Liaise with training partners, aftercare agencies, and referral partners

  • Represent Hawker Boys clearly and accurately to external stakeholders

  • Ensure consistent programme messaging and expectations

Requirements

  • Comfortable working with ex-offenders and vulnerable individuals

  • Strong communication and people skills

  • Able to persuade, motivate, and hold firm boundaries

  • Organised, reliable, and consistent with follow-ups

  • Experience in sales, recruitment, outreach, or people management is an advantage

  • Education level is not a priority

What This Role Is Not

  • Not a counseling role

  • Not a purely administrative role

  • Not a work-from-home position

Salary

S$2,500 – S$3,200 per month

(Commensurate with experience, with progression opportunities)

Why Join Us

  • Meaningful, ground-level work with real impact

  • Close exposure to programme leadership and operations

  • Opportunity to grow into a senior role as the programme scales

  • A team that values structure, accountability, and dignity of work

postedCompany.description:
Hawker Boys is a social enterprise in Singapore that supports ex-offenders in building stable livelihoods through the hawker trade. The work is practical, structured and built around clear standards and dignity of work.

Our approach is anchored on four pillars:

Training

WSQ-aligned hawker training with real-world practice. Trainees learn culinary foundations alongside business basics such as costing, simple operations, communication, and digital productivity tools, including simple AI tools for admin, SOP writing and basic content creation.


Placement

Market-rate job placement with partner hawkers. Where needed, supported work options are used to help individuals build consistency before moving into open placement.


Aftercare

Wraparound aftercare with partner agencies. Ongoing mentoring, practical accountability, and steady support to help trainees stay consistent over time.


Ownership

A supported pathway to stall ownership for graduates who show readiness and consistency. This is offered with guidance and support so graduates can work towards long-term independence.

Hawker Boys is built for people who believe in second chances and long-term outcomes.
postedCompany.name: HAWKER BOYS PTE. LTD.
